title: Email Integration on Exchange 2013 on Premise
excerpt: I have MS Exchange 2013 64bit on Windows Server R2 2012.  I would like to know if monday.com crm can integrate messaging through my On-Prem Exchange.  Most CRM out there like keap, goldmine, pipedrive, freshwork and any …

posts.author: benchua (ben chua)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have MS Exchange 2013 64bit on Windows Server R2 2012. I would like to know if monday.com crm can integrate messaging through my On-Prem Exchange. Most CRM out there like keap, goldmine, pipedrive, freshwork and any other cloud crm only integrate to Exchange 360, Office 365, or Outlook.com

Please advise. Thank you!

posts.author: abaldock (Alex Baldock)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Ben. We’ve been trialling Monday but I think this is going to be a sticking point for us also. Our org has its own hosted email on premise.

Not much point using Monday to slim down our workload and then not be able to email out of the platform.

Frustrating as a few competitors have other access points.
